base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of armos_walk — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Armos — statue-enemy. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Armos — statue-enemy; 2-frame walk once activated; starts as stone statue in fixed poses and comes alive on contact. Decorative-to-threat transformation
